string 2: It looks like you didn't get much sleep, did you, Agent {player}?

I'm afraid I couldn't help but overhear... Did what Inori Misono
say get to you?

I ask since you couldn't seem to step through that door to the roof...
At any rate, it seems she lost her family.

It's only natural you'd identify with her. After all, you...
lost the person who raised you to an anomaly, as well.

That said, you can't let your emotions get tied up in this. Inori Misono
and Aegiomon are anomalies themselves.

Remember, they're just subjects of our investigation. You're
trying to stop a global collapse. Get back to the mission.
Good morning, {player}! I made breakfast!
H-Hey, look!

We have word of a bizarre development in Shinjuku. A spatial
distortion has been confirmed in the streets of Kabukicho.

Some believe this to be another example of the paranormal
phenomena we've been seeing so many of recently.
Riot police are being dispatched to the scene.
Oh, no! Do you think this is related to the Digimon, too, somehow?
Maybe we shouldn't tell Aegiomon about this...
I don't think you need to worry about him so much.{next}
Yeah. Maybe keep it on the down-low for now.{next}
No? I hope you're right...

What happened yesterday really seemed to throw him for a
loop, though...
Yeah...

I can't stop worrying about it, though. I'm going to go 
check on him. But you go ahead and eat!
So... strange things are happening in Shinjuku's Kabukicho?

Once you know how this town's going to meet its end, every 
new incident takes on greater significance.
I think it couldn't hurt to look into it.
Copy that. Starting investigation.{next}
Look...
It's not like I came to apologize or anything!
I just thought I'd... give him... this.
It's not an apology, okay?! But you HAVE to give it to him!
AAAAAAAAAGH!
Ngh...!
Graaaaagh!
Ungh...!
Graaagh!
*gasp*
Yah!
Hiyaaaaah!
Ungh...!
Gaaagh!
AAAAAGH!
Ngh!
Ahhhhh...
Hmm?
Wha—? *confused noises*
You! Egg thief!
Ngh...!
Huh?!
Gwaaaaargh!
Gaaaaargh!
Graaaaaaaaagh!

...Right, egg thief! It's kind of your fault things turned out 
this way!
So take some responsibility... and help us out.

And you'd better believe what I'm saying, or your world is
in big trouble too, egg thief!
Greymon, huh? I know that bad boy's weakness!
And I've got just the thing!
I'll make an opening for you! I'll set 'em up, and you knock them down!
Good. Now's our chance...
RUN! Lead the way!
Run? Where to?!{next}
In that case... Shall we go to my place? {next}
How the heck am I supposed to know?! Anywhere's better than here!
Maybe your place or something? Whatever! Let's just get out of here!
No clue where that is, but fine by me!
Go on. I'm right behind you!

That human in the weird outfit... quickly got along with the phase
electron lifeform.
Who—or what—is that...?

It would be strange if that battle wasn't recorded, but I
can't find any data on it eight years later...
This is... definitely an anomaly.
That thing... Is that what I'm like, too?
Hey, {player}! Look at this!
...Huh?
You're the one... we just saw on TV!
What in the world is going on here?
Finally, a moment's peace. Thanks for this.
I'm glad you like it.

Now, I've got a few questions to ask... Well, more like, too
many questions!

{player}, can I count on you to help me make sense out of
all this?

Sure. Let's sort out our situation first. Ask me anything you want, 
egg thief.
Who are you?
Where did you come from?
Tell us about that huge Digimon.
I'm not an egg thief!
I'm all out of questions.{next}
I'm Minervamon, and I came to this world on a certain mission.
But things have taken quite a turn since then...

I come from Iliad, a Digital World that's kind of a parallel
universe to the Material World you live in.

You came to our temple once, remember? Well, that temple
exists in a world completely separate from this one.
That was one of the Titans that are wreaking havoc in our world.
It seems they've been popping up in this world, too.

I know, but the nickname stuck. What do you want me to say?
Still, how'd a human like you end up at the temple, anyway?

But I guess that's a question for another time. More
importantly right now, I could really use your help.
So, any other questions? I'm all ears, egg thief.

I see. In that case, it's your turn to hear me out. Will you 
help me fulfill my mission?
Sure, I'll lend you a hand.{next}
What's your mission?
I have my own job to do.
Sure, I'll lend you a hand.{next}

I'm searching for that egg. You know the one. I'm positive
it fell into this world somewhere, but...

...there are a lot of things I don't know about your world.
That's why I need your help.
I see. And what job is that?
Hmm... That's all pretty vague, don't you think?

Still, I get the feeling your job and my mission aren't
exactly unrelated.
Good. Thanks, appreciate it.
Anyway, we've gotta decide where to start.
This is all a lot for us to take in...

It's already getting late. Why don't we call it a night, and
figure out our next steps tomorrow?
All right. I'll go look for a place to sleep tonight.
Well...

Why don't you stay here? The way you look, you're bound to
call attention to yourself out there.

Who knows what kind of trouble would happen if you
run into the police.
Besides...
...I'm sure Aegiomon would love the chance to talk to you.
I admit, I'm a bit curious about him, myself.
Why's a Digimon living with humans, anyway?
I bet you have lots of questions, too, right, Aegiomon?
...Yeah.
Don't worry about my dad. He already gave the okay.

So let's turn in for the night. We'll have plenty to discuss
in the morning!
